results.rendered_html:
2. ajaya (3. a + jaya)
1〉 adj. unbesiegbar.
— 2〉 m.
a〉 ein Beiname Viṣṇuʼs  HARIV. S. 927, Z. 4, v. u. 
— b〉 N. eines Lexicographen  MED. Anh. 2 .
— c〉 N. eines Flusses in Rāḍha  ŚKDR. 
— 3〉 f. ˚yā
a〉 Hanf  RĀJAN. _im_ ŚKDR. ; vgl. vijayā.
— b〉 N. pr. eine der beiden Freundinnen der Durgā  TRIK. 1,1,54 ; vgl. vijayā.

results.rendered_html:
ajaya a. [nāsti parairjayo yasya]
1 Invincible, unsurpassed, unconquerable.
— yaḥ [na. ta.] A defeat; lābhālābhau jayājayau  Bg. 2. 38. 
2 N. of Agni (ajena chāgena yāti; yā-ka), or of Viṣṇu (according to some); of a lexicographer.
— yā [nāsti jayo mādakatvena asyāṃ]
1 Hemp or bhāṃga.
2 N. of a friend of Durgā.
3 Māyā or illusion.
